steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $405$, so the answer is D, 405. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Square first, then multiply.
$$f(9)=5\cdot 81=405$$
D is correct.
